name: roomie-kit
description: Set up, customize, and diagnose Roomie Kit apps with Roomie Kit Cloud.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and customize Roomie Kit with paid Cloud access.
interface.longDescription: Roomie Kit connects Codex to Roomie Kit Cloud so paid customers can bootstrap, customize, diagnose, and prepare Roomie Kit apps. Customer Supabase, Vercel, Agora, and asset secrets stay local.
defaultPrompt: Use Roomie Kit to log in, then help set up and customize this app.
Use Roomie Kit to check my deployment setup and point me to the right docs.
